# Flxks User Guide

Welcome to the Flxks User Guide! Flxks is a premium desktop multimedia viewer that gives you an optimized, engaging, and dynamic visual experience.

## Getting Started

1. **Launch Flxks**: from your Applications folder.
2. **Open Media**: Simply drag and drop any folder containing images or videos onto the app, or use `Cmd + O` to select a folder.
3. **Add media**: CMD+8 for images, CMD+9 for videos
4. **Navigate**: Press Space Bar to Play/Pause image slideshow and video playback. Use the `J, K, L or N` keys to glide through your media effortlessly.

## Selecting a Quadrant ##
To use keyboard commands, hover over a quadrant, then use keyboard commands.

### Mastering Keyboard Navigatio
Flxks is specifically designed to be used without a mouse. Once your media is loaded, your keyboard becomes the most powerful way to control the app:

**Core Playback & Navigation:**
- **`K` or `Space`**: Play or pause the current video, or start/stop the image slideshow.
- **`J` and `L`**: Skip backward or forward in a video by 8 seconds, or instantly move to the previous/next image.
- **`N`**: Jump to the next video or the next image in a sequence.
- **`R`**: Toggle between Random and Sequential playback.
- **`S`**: Toggle Series mode to intelligently play files sequentially based on their trailing numbers.
- **`B`**: jumps to the last media file displayed.

**Media Management & Tools:**
- **`T`**: Instantly take a high-quality snapshot of the current video frame.
- **`Cmd + Shift + S`**: Choose the destination folder where your video snapshots will be saved.
- **`Cmd + D`**: Mark the currently playing media for deletion to keep your library clean.
- **`M`**: Mute or unmute video playback.

**Search & Information:**
- **`Cmd + F`**: Open Find Mode to quickly search for specific files *(Premium)*.
- **`Cmd + G`**: Jump to the next search result *(Premium)*.
- **`G`**: Show or hide the media information banner.
- **`Cmd + I`**: Display your library statistics and total media count.

## Free Version Restrictions

If you are using the free version of Flxks, some premium functionality is restricted to ensure stability and encourage upgrades to the full version. The following limitations apply to the free version:

- **Slides**: Limited to 2 slides maximum.
- **Expands**: Limited to 2 expands.
- **Search (Find-Nexts)**: Limited to 2 sequential searches.
- **Isolation Mode**: Disabled (`I` key).
- **Find Mode**: Disabled (`Cmd + F`).
- **New Windows**: Disabled.

To unlock all features and remove these restrictions, you can purchase a license directly within the app or on [flxks.com](https://flxks.com).

## Keyboard Shortcuts

Flxks is built for power users. Below is the complete reference of all available keyboard and mouse commands, organized by category.

### Global Commands
| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Cmd + K` | Show in-app command reference |
| `Cmd + O` | Open media folders |
| `Cmd + N` | Add new window / screen *(Premium)* |
| `Cmd + Option + R` | Restore previous session layout *(Premium)* |
| `Cmd + 8` | Create new image quadrant |
| `Cmd + 9` | Create new video quadrant |
| `Cmd + 5` | Toggle quadrant type (image ↔ video) |
| `Cmd + -` | Remove target quadrant |
| `Cmd + W` | Close pop-out window |
| `Cmd + ,` | Open preferences |
| `Cmd + I` | Display media library statistics |
| `Cmd + Shift + S` | Select snapshot save folder |
| `Cmd + F` | Search media (Find Mode) *(Premium)* |
| `Cmd + G` | Find next search result *(Premium)* |
| `Space` | Toggle play/pause globally |
| `M` | Toggle mute globally |
| `G` | Toggle banner mode (temporary/persistent) |
| `Tab` | Cycle to next quadrant |
| `I` | Toggle quadrant isolation *(Premium)* |
| `'` | Pop out target quadrant |
| `Control + F` | Toggle app window fullscreen |
| `Option + Z` | Cycle playlist sort type |
| `Option + Shift + Z` | Toggle playlist sort direction |
| `Q` | Quit application |

### Video Quadrant Commands
| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `K` | Toggle play/pause |
| `L` | Skip forward 8 seconds |
| `J` | Skip backward 8 seconds |
| `N` | Next video |
| `P` | Previous video |
| `B` | Go back in playback history |
| `R` | Toggle random/sequential playback |
| `S` | Toggle series mode (play by filename number) |
| `C` | Toggle video controller visibility |
| `W` | Segment loop (1=start, 2=set, 3=cancel) |
| `T` | Take snapshot of current frame |
| `,` | Increase playback rate |
| `.` | Decrease playback rate |

### Image Quadrant Commands
| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `K` | Toggle play/pause |
| `L` | Next image |
| `J` | Previous image |
| `F` | Set slide direction forward |
| `B` | Set slide direction backward |
| `R` | Toggle random/sequential playback |
| `S` | Toggle series mode (play by filename number) |
| `0-9` | Set slideshow speed (0.5 to 9 seconds) |

### Quadrant Resizing & Movement
| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Cmd + ↑/↓/←/→` | Join quadrant with adjacent quadrant |
| `↑/↓/←/→` | Move target quadrant or swap with adjacent |

### Media Operations
| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `O` | Reveal current media in Finder |
| `Cmd + D` | Mark current media for deletion |

### Mouse Commands
| Shortcut | Action |
|----------|--------|
| `Drag and Drop` | Swap quadrants |
| `Option + Drag and Drop` | Copy quadrant state to target |
| `Hover` | Auto-select quadrant using mouse position |
| `Grid Clicks` | Control image quadrant (speed, direction, mode) |

## Auto-Play and Transitions
Flxks features intelligent auto-play that seamlessly transitions between your photos and videos. Once started, videos will play to completion, and photos will display for a configurable duration before advancing to the next item in the folder.

## Privacy & Security
Flxks is built with a privacy-first approach. **Everything stays on your local device.** 
- No cloud uploads
- No third-party data sharing
- No external processing

You have complete control over your media at all times.
